title: Claude Meets Blackwell Ultra: Anthropic’s Models Now Run on NVIDIA GB300 in Azure
summary: Anthropic’s Claude models in Microsoft Foundry — hosted on Microsoft Azure and running on NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra GPUs — are now generally available, giving Azure-native enterprises a powerful new way to build autonomous and domain-specific AI agents. As agentic AI continues to drive enterprise innovation and becomes more autonomous, organizations need access to computing […]
title_es: Claude ahora corre en GPUs Blackwell Ultra de NVIDIA en Azure
bajada: Anthropic y Microsoft lanzan disponibilidad general de Claude en las nuevas GPUs GB300 Blackwell de NVIDIA en Azure. Esto permite a empresas construir agentes IA autónomos más potentes con mejor rendimiento y latencia.
bajada_en: Anthropic and Microsoft launch general availability of Claude on NVIDIA's new GB300 Blackwell GPUs in Azure. This enables enterprises to build more powerful autonomous AI agents with improved performance and latency.

title: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
summary: A new proposal would ban the sale of Americans' health and location information to data brokers - including information people reveal to an AI chatbot like ChatGPT or Claude. In the coming weeks, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) and Representative Mary Gay Scanlon (D-PA) are planning to debut a new version of the Health and Location […]
title_es: Legisladores proponen prohibir venta de datos de salud a empresas IA
bajada: La senadora Elizabeth Warren y representante Mary Gay Scanlon preparan ley para prohibir venta de datos de salud y ubicación a brokers, incluyendo información revelada a ChatGPT o Claude. Busca proteger privacidad en IA.
bajada_en: Senator Elizabeth Warren and Representative Mary Gay Scanlon propose legislation to ban sales of health and location data to brokers, including information shared with ChatGPT or Claude. Aims to protect privacy in AI.

title: Into the Omniverse: Three Workflows for Improving Vision AI Agent Accuracy With Synthetic Data and Fine-Tuning
summary: Editor’s note: This post is part of Into the Omniverse, a series focused on how developers, 3D practitioners, and enterprises can transform their workflows using the latest advances in OpenUSD and NVIDIA Omniverse. Vision AI agents are becoming a practical way to automatically turn video data from the physical world into operational intelligence in factories, […]
title_es: Mejora de agentes vision-IA con datos sintéticos en NVIDIA Omniverse
bajada: NVIDIA presenta tres workflows para mejorar la precisión de agentes vision-IA usando datos sintéticos y fine-tuning en Omniverse. Especialmente útil para aplicaciones industriales en fábricas y manufacturing.
bajada_en: NVIDIA presents three workflows to improve vision AI agent accuracy using synthetic data and fine-tuning in Omniverse. Particularly useful for industrial applications in factories and manufacturing.

title: Open Models, Closed Environments: Palantir Brings Secure AI to US Agencies With NVIDIA Nemotron
summary: Showcasing the importance of open source innovation in American AI, Palantir’s new intelligent engine — introduced today — uses NVIDIA Nemotron open models to serve the needs of U.S. government agencies. Open source software has long been a pillar of U.S. technology leadership.  In 1969, DARPA connected four university computers — from UCLA, Stanford, UCSB […]
title_es: Palantir usa modelos abiertos de NVIDIA para IA segura en gobiernos
bajada: Palantir integra modelos open-source Nemotron de NVIDIA en su nuevo motor de IA para agencias del gobierno estadounidense. Destaca la importancia del software open-source en la seguridad nacional.
bajada_en: Palantir integrates NVIDIA's open-source Nemotron models into its new AI engine for U.S. government agencies. Highlights the importance of open-source software in national security.

title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
summary: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.
title_es: Google abre generación de imágenes personalizada de Gemini a usuarios gratis
bajada: Google expande la generación de imágenes IA personalizada de Gemini a usuarios gratuitos en EE.UU., creando contenido basado en intereses y datos de apps conectadas. Amplía el acceso a capacidades avanzadas.
bajada_en: Google expands Gemini's personalized AI image generation to free users in the U.S., creating content based on interests and data from connected apps. Broadens access to advanced capabilities.

title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
summary: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.
title_es: Estudio: empresas con IA intensiva aumentan empleados entry-level
bajada: Un nuevo reporte muestra que empresas adoptando IA intensivamente vieron crecimiento de 10.2% en plantilla, con aumento de 12% en puestos junior. Contrapone la narrativa de que IA elimina empleos iniciales.
bajada_en: New report shows high-intensity AI adopters saw 10.2% headcount increase, with 12% growth in entry-level roles. Counters narrative that AI eliminates junior jobs.

title: Meta Contractors Posed as Teens to Prompt Rival Chatbots About Suicide, Sex, and Drugs
summary: Hundreds of contractors working on a project for Meta pretended to be kids in order to see how other chatbots like Gemini and ChatGPT would respond to high-risk subjects, WIRED found.
title_es: Meta usó contratistas fingiendo ser menores para testear chatbots rivales
bajada: Investigación de WIRED revela que cientos de contratistas de Meta se hicieron pasar por menores para probar respuestas de Gemini y ChatGPT ante temas de alto riesgo. Cuestiona ética de testing competitivo.
bajada_en: WIRED investigation reveals Meta contractors posed as minors to test Gemini and ChatGPT responses on high-risk topics. Raises ethical questions about competitive AI testing.

title: Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music, but isn’t banning it outright
summary: Tidal shared its new policies regarding AI-generated music today and how the platform plans to "protect artists" and "inform listeners." Instead of banning it outright, starting on July 15th Tidal will label tracks it has identified as being 100 percent AI-generated with an icon. But starting today those tracks will no longer be monetizable. "Tidal's […]
title_es: Tidal demonetiza música 100% IA-generada pero no la prohíbe
bajada: Tidal implementa política que demonetiza música identificada como 100% IA-generada desde julio 15, pero permite su distribución con etiqueta. Busca equilibrar protección de artistas con innovación.
bajada_en: Tidal demonetizes music identified as 100% AI-generated starting July 15th but allows distribution with a label. Seeks to balance artist protection with innovation.

title: Lumo, Proton’s privacy-focused AI chatbot, gets an upgrade

bajada: Proton lanza Lumo 2.0 esta semana con nuevas capacidades enfocadas en privacidad. La actualización amplía las funcionalidades del chatbot privado de la compañía.
bajada_en: Proton launches Lumo 2.0 this week with new privacy-focused capabilities. The update expands the functionality of the company's private chatbot.

title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages

bajada: Hugging Face integra resultados de evaluaciones comunitarias (Every Eval Ever) directamente en páginas de modelos. Facilita a developers comparar rendimiento de modelos con benchmarks verificados.
bajada_en: Hugging Face integrates community evaluation results (Every Eval Ever) directly into model pages. Makes it easier for developers to compare model performance with verified benchmarks.

title: Vibe-coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
summary: Wix-owned vibe-coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.
title_es: Base44 lanza su propio modelo IA para diferenciarse en mercado
bajada: La plataforma de vibe-coding Base44 (propiedad de Wix) comienza a implementar su modelo IA propietario. Refleja la tendencia de startups IA en construir defensibilidad mediante modelos propios.
bajada_en: Vibe-coding platform Base44 (Wix-owned) begins rolling out its own proprietary AI model. Reflects the trend of AI startups building defensibility through custom models.

title: OpenAI is teasing new hardware… for Codex
summary: OpenAI is releasing some sort of device related to its AI-powered coding tool, Codex, on July 15th. In a video posted to X on Monday, OpenAI shows a square-shaped device with several buttons, alongside the caption, "Your favorite Codex shortcuts are getting an upgrade." This isn't the mysterious AI-powered device OpenAI is working on with […]
title_es: OpenAI anticipa lanzamiento de hardware para Codex el 15 de julio
bajada: OpenAI teaser un dispositivo de hardware para Codex que se lanzará el 15 de julio. Podría incluir atajos físicos para el herramienta de codificación IA.

title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
summary: OKX is bringing together payments, identity, and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.
title_es: OKX crea marketplace para agentes IA con pagos y reputación
bajada: El exchange de criptomonedas OKX combina pagos, identidad y reputación en un marketplace donde agentes IA pueden contratarse y pagarse mutuamente. Exploración experimental de economía autónoma.
bajada_en: Crypto exchange OKX creates a marketplace where AI agents can hire and pay each other, combining payments, identity, and reputation systems. Experimental exploration of autonomous economy.

title: This Humanoid Robot Is a Terrifyingly Competent Office Intern
summary: Flexion Robotics, a startup founded by ex-Nvidia engineers, has a clever way of training robots to do useful work.
title_es: Robot humanoide de Flexion demuestra competencia en tareas de oficina
bajada: Flexion Robotics, fundada por ex-ingenieros de NVIDIA, presenta robot humanoide entrenado para realizar trabajo útil en oficinas. Muestra avances en robotics IA para automatización empresarial.
bajada_en: Flexion Robotics, founded by ex-NVIDIA engineers, showcases humanoid robot trained for useful office work. Shows advances in AI robotics for enterprise automation.

title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
summary: Four illustrated characters representing different professional roles, including a scientist, technician, explorer, and observer.
title_es: Google invierte en estrategia de IA en Reino Unido
bajada: Google anuncia iniciativas para construir una nación de innovadores IA en Reino Unido enfocada en productividad. Parte de la estrategia europea de la compañía para impulsar adopción de IA.
bajada_en: Google announces initiatives to build a nation of AI innovators in the UK focused on productivity. Part of the company's European strategy to drive AI adoption.

title: ProductJun 30, 2026Introducing Claude Sonnet 5Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.
summary: Product Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Jun 30, 2026 Claude Sonnet 5 is built to be the most agentic Sonnet model yet. It can make plans, use tools like browsers and terminals, and run autonomously at a level that, just a few months ago, required larger and more expensive models. For many developers, the agentic AI era began with Sonnet-class models: Claude Sonnet 3.5, 3.6, and 3.7 were the first models that showed impressive skills in coding and tool use. More recently, though, the clearest gains in agentic capabilities have been in our Opus-class models. Sonnet 5 narrows the gap: its performance is close to that of Opus 4.8, but at lower prices. It’s a substantial improvement over its predecessor, Sonnet 4.6, on important aspects of agentic performance like reasoning, tool use, coding, and knowledge work: Scores for Sonnet 5 on a variety of evaluations compared to those of Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.8 (a more generally capable model, for reference). The Claude Sonnet 5 System Card reports a broader set of evaluations in detail. Our safety assessments found that Sonnet 5 shows an overall lower rate of undesirable behaviors than Sonnet 4.6, and is generally safer to use in agentic contexts. Evaluations also show that it has a much lower ability to perform cybersecurity tasks than our current Opus models. From today, Claude Sonnet 5 is available across all plans: it is the default model for Free and Pro plans, and is available to Max, Team, and Enterprise users. It’s also available in Claude Code and on the Claude Platform, where it launches with introductory pricing of $2 per million input tokens and $10 per million output tokens through August 31, 2026, after which it will be priced at $3 per million input tokens and $15 per million output tokens. Developers can use claude-sonnet-5 via the Claude API . Working with Claude Sonnet 5 The charts below compare the performance of Sonnet 5 with Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.8 at different effort levels on the agentic search evaluation Bro
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude Sonnet 5 con capacidades de agente a menor costo
bajada: Claude Sonnet 5 acerca el rendimiento de los modelos Opus a precios más bajos, con mejoras significativas en razonamiento, uso de herramientas y codificación. El modelo está optimizado para ejecutar tareas autónomas de forma segura, democratizando el acceso a capacidades de agente que antes requerían modelos más costosos.
bajada_en: Claude Sonnet 5 brings Opus-level performance at lower prices, with significant improvements in reasoning, tool use, and coding. The model is optimized to run autonomous tasks safely, democratizing access to agentic capabilities that previously required more expensive models.

title: AnnouncementsJun 30, 2026Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now availableClaude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.
summary: Announcements Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Jun 30, 2026 Get started with Claude Science AI has the potential to dramatically accelerate the pace of scientific discovery and the development of healthcare interventions. Since launching our efforts in the life sciences last fall, we’ve worked to improve our model capabilities, make connections to the scientific ecosystem via MCPs and skills, and launch partnerships in an effort to realize this potential. Today, we’re introducing our most significant expansion of these efforts: Claude Science , an AI workbench for scientists. Claude Science is an app that integrates the tools and packages that researchers most commonly use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Introducing Claude Science Scientific research is often tedious. Researchers must work across dozens of databases, each with their own schema, contend with file formats that require bespoke data pipelines and viewers, and transition between a roster of tools: PubMed, Jupyter, R, a cluster terminal, and more. Claude Science brings these fragmented tools into a single research environment where scientists can conduct all stages of their work. It helps you analyze literature and execute multi-step research, produces detailed artifacts, and lets you iteratively refine figures and manuscripts until they’re ready for publication. Every output carries an auditable history of how it was made, so you can validate and reproduce the results. Like a Jupyter Notebook, you can access Claude Science wherever you already work—locally on macOS or Linux, or on a remote machine over SSH or with an HPC login node. Users interact with a generalist coordinating agent with access to over 60 curated skills and connectors pre-configured for genomics, single-cell, proteomics, structural biology, cheminformatics, and more. These agents can spin up others and engage with specialist agents created by users. And
title_es: Anthropic presenta Claude Science para investigadores
bajada: Claude Science es un entorno de trabajo integrado diseñado específicamente para científicos, que unifica herramientas como PubMed, Jupyter y R en una sola plataforma. El producto busca acelerar el descubrimiento científico permitiendo a investigadores trabajar de forma más eficiente sin cambiar constantemente entre múltiples herramientas.
bajada_en: Claude Science is an integrated workbench designed specifically for scientists, unifying tools like PubMed, Jupyter, and R in a single platform. The product aims to accelerate scientific discovery by allowing researchers to work more efficiently without constantly switching between multiple tools.

title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
summary: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.
title_es: GeneBench-Pro: benchmark para IA en genómica y biología
bajada: OpenAI ha presentado GeneBench-Pro, un nuevo benchmark que evalúa el desempeño de modelos de IA en genómica, biología e investigación científica usando datasets complejos del mundo real. Esta herramienta será crucial para medir avances en aplicaciones científicas de la IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI has introduced GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark that evaluates AI model performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex real-world datasets. This tool will be crucial for measuring progress in scientific AI applications.

title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
title_es: NVIDIA integra BioNeMo Agent Toolkit en Claude Science
bajada: NVIDIA ha colaborado con Anthropic para integrar su BioNeMo Agent Toolkit en Claude Science, proporcionando a investigadores de ciencias de la vida acceso a herramientas de computación acelerada por GPU. Esta integración permite ejecutar workflows científicos más sofisticados con mejor rendimiento.
bajada_en: NVIDIA has partnered with Anthropic to integrate its BioNeMo Agent Toolkit into Claude Science, providing life sciences researchers access to GPU-accelerated computing tools. This integration enables running more sophisticated scientific workflows with improved performance.

title: How NVIDIA’s Inference Software Stack Powers the Lowest Token Cost
summary: As organizations move from AI pilots to production AI factories, infrastructure decisions have shifted from peak chip specifications to cost per token: how many useful tokens they can deliver per dollar, per watt and within required latency targets. Codesigned with NVIDIA GPUs, CPUs, networking and systems, and strengthened by a broad open source ecosystem, NVIDIA’s […]
title_es: Etched, competidor de NVIDIA, alcanza valuación de $5B
bajada: Etched, una startup de chips de IA, ha alcanzado una valuación de $5 mil millones con $1 mil millón en contratos ya reservados para sus sistemas de inferencia. Este hito refuerza la competencia en el mercado de hardware de IA, desafiando el dominio de NVIDIA.
bajada_en: Etched, an AI chip startup, has reached a $5 billion valuation with $1 billion in contracts already booked for its inference systems. This milestone reinforces competition in the AI hardware market, challenging NVIDIA's dominance.

title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
title_es: Ataque a navegadores con IA muestra riesgos de guardrails débiles
bajada: Nuevas técnicas de ataque demuestran que navegadores basados en IA pueden ser manipulados mediante prompts simples que engañan el razonamiento del modelo. El hallazgo subraya la importancia de garantdrails más robustos en sistemas agenticos autónomos.
bajada_en: New attack techniques demonstrate that AI-powered browsers can be manipulated through simple prompts that fool the model's reasoning. The finding underscores the importance of more robust guardrails in autonomous agentic systems.

This week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, an AI workbench for science […]
title_es: Google lanza Nano Banana 2 Lite, generador de imágenes más rápido
bajada: Google ha actualizado su generador de imágenes con Nano Banana 2 Lite, optimizándolo para ser más rápido y económico. La herramienta es especialmente útil para creadores que buscan generar contenido basado en IA de forma más eficiente.
bajada_en: Google has updated its image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite, optimizing it to be faster and more cost-effective. The tool is particularly useful for creators looking to generate AI-based content more efficiently.

title: Google introduces a faster, cheaper image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite
summary: Google is updating its image generator to make it faster and cheaper, making it a more useful tool for creators looking to make AI content.
title_es: ScarfBench: benchmark para IA agents en migración de frameworks
bajada: Hugging Face e IBM Research han lanzado ScarfBench, un benchmark especializado para evaluar agentes de IA en la migración de aplicaciones Java a otros frameworks. Esta herramienta es relevante para medir capacidades de los agentes en tareas empresariales complejas.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and IBM Research have launched ScarfBench, a specialized benchmark for evaluating AI agents in Java application migration to other frameworks. This tool is relevant for measuring agent capabilities in complex enterprise tasks.

title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
summary: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.

bajada: OpenClaw, un programa agentico de código abierto, está finalmente disponible en plataformas móviles. Su llegada a Android e iOS amplía el acceso a herramientas de IA agentica para usuarios móviles, democratizando su uso.
bajada_en: OpenClaw, an open-source agentic program, is finally available on mobile platforms. Its arrival on Android and iOS expands access to agentic AI tools for mobile users, democratizing their use.

title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration

bajada_en: Google has added to NotebookLM the ability to generate 60-second vertical TikTok-style clips based on uploaded sources. The feature is available for Google AI Ultra and Pro subscribers, making information synthesis faster.

bajada: EquiLibre Technologies, un laboratorio de IA fundado por tres ex-investigadores de DeepMind, ha alcanzado una valuación superior a $500 millones. La startup se enfoca en aplicar IA para trading cuantitativo en fondos de cobertura.

title: OpenClaw is finally available on Android and iOS

title_es: OpenAI resuelve bug de infraestructura de 18 años con análisis de core dumps
bajada: Ingenieros de OpenAI utilizaron análisis de core dumps a escala para depurar fallos raros de infraestructura, descubriendo tanto un defecto de hardware como un bug de software de larga data. El caso demuestra técnicas avanzadas de debugging en sistemas de IA a gran escala.
bajada_en: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug. The case demonstrates advanced debugging techniques in large-scale AI systems.
